damageLocations.name: Bnei Brak / Rosh HaAyin / Petah Tikva (cluster munitions)
damageLocations.description: Iranian cluster munition ballistic missiles hit 15 locations across central Israel. Apartment fire in Rosh HaAyin. Widespread vehicle and building damage. Power outages. 1 lightly wounded.

damageLocations.name: Neot Hovav Industrial Zone
damageLocations.description: Fire at Neot Hovav industrial zone south of Beersheba from Iranian missile strike. Brought under control. No hazardous leaks reported.

damageLocations.name: Sohmor-Mashghara Bridge
damageLocations.description: Israel destroyed bridge linking Sohmor-Mashghara in eastern Lebanon. 6th+ Litani crossing cut. Bekaa Valley increasingly isolated.

damageLocations.name: Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant (4th attack)
damageLocations.description: Projectile hit perimeter of Bushehr Nuclear Plant. 1 security guard killed. Auxiliary building damaged. IAEA confirmed no radiation increase. 4th attack since Feb 28.

damageLocations.name: Mahshahr Special Petrochemical Zone
damageLocations.description: US-Israeli strikes hit 6 petrochemical plants: Fajr 1&2, Rejal, Amir Kabir, Abou Ali, Bandar-e Imam Khomeini. Iran's 2nd-largest petrochemical complex. 5 injured, all personnel evacuated.

damageLocations.name: Ramada Hotel, Raouche, Beirut
damageLocations.description: IDF Navy struck Ramada Hotel in Raouche district. 5 IRGC Quds Force commanders killed. Building severely damaged.

damageLocations.name: Lebanese Italian Hospital, Tyre
damageLocations.description: Israeli strikes destroyed 2 buildings near hospital. Windows shattered, ceilings collapsed. 11 injured. Hospital operations disrupted.

damageLocations.name: Oracle HQ, Dubai Internet City
damageLocations.description: Oracle HQ damaged by Iranian drone/interception debris. IRGC claimed targeting data center. Facade and signage damaged. No injuries.

damageLocations.name: Metula Guesthouse Complex
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah missile direct hit on guesthouse complex in Metula. Surrounding homes and infrastructure damaged. 1 person lightly wounded.

damageLocations.name: Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant (4th strike)
damageLocations.description: Projectile struck auxiliary building near Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant. 1 IAEA guard killed. No radiation increase. Russia evacuated 198 Rosatom staff.

damageLocations.name: Mahshahr Petrochemical Zone (5 facilities)
damageLocations.description: Fajr 1&2, Rejal, Abu Ali, Bandar Imam petrochemical facilities struck. 5 killed, 170 wounded.

damageLocations.name: Lebanese Italian Hospital (vicinity)
damageLocations.description: 2 buildings near hospital destroyed. Windows shattered, ceilings collapsed. 11-storey building NE of Tyre also destroyed. 2 girls killed in Habbush.

damageLocations.name: Sohmor-Mashghara Bridge
damageLocations.description: Bridge linking Sohmor to Mashghara destroyed by Israeli warplanes to cut Hezbollah supply lines.

damageLocations.name: IDF Kirya HQ vicinity
damageLocations.description: Iranian cluster munition submunitions hit parking lot and nearby school. Multiple cars destroyed in Ramat Gan.

damageLocations.name: Shuwaikh Oil Sector Complex
damageLocations.description: Drone attack caused fire at Kuwait Petroleum Corp/Ministry of Oil building. Evacuated, fire contained. No injuries.

damageLocations.name: Beheshti University Medical Research Institute
damageLocations.description: IDF strikes nearly destroyed Beheshti University medical research institute. Part of 272-strike wave across 14 provinces. Over 30 Iranian universities targeted since war began.

damageLocations.name: Kuwait Power/Water Desalination Plants
damageLocations.description: Iranian drone attacks damaged two power and water desalination plants. Kuwait Petroleum Corp HQ also hit. No injuries.

damageLocations.name: Neot Hovav Chemical Industrial Zone
damageLocations.description: Iranian ballistic missile struck chemical plant causing hazardous materials leak. 3 hazmat teams deployed. 1 lightly wounded. Second strike on this facility since late March.

damageLocations.name: BAPCO Oil Storage Tank
damageLocations.description: Iranian drone struck storage tank at BAPCO Energies facility causing large fireball. Fire contained and extinguished. No injuries.

damageLocations.name: Haifa Residential Building
damageLocations.description: Iranian ballistic missile (400 kg warhead, NOT intercepted) scored direct hit on residential building. Building partially collapsed. 4 injured (1 critical, 82-year-old), 3-4 missing under rubble including child. Warhead may not have fully detonated — nearby buildings evacuated.

damageLocations.name: Jnah Neighbourhood near Rafik Hariri Hospital
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Jnah neighbourhood approximately 100m from Rafik Hariri University Hospital. 4 killed, 39 wounded. Significant damage to surrounding structures.

damageLocations.name: Haifa Residential Building — Iranian Missile Direct Hit
damageLocations.description: 7-story residential building partially collapsed after direct hit by Iranian ballistic missile. 2 confirmed dead, 2 missing under rubble, 24 wounded.

damageLocations.name: Kfar Hatta — 8+ Homes Destroyed by Israeli Airstrike
damageLocations.description: At least 8 homes destroyed in Israeli airstrike on southern Lebanese town. 7 killed including displaced family.

damageLocations.name: South Pars Petrochemical Complex — Asaluyeh Destroyed
damageLocations.description: Israeli strikes destroyed Asaluyeh petrochemical complex, Iran's largest. 85% of Iran's petrochemical exports now offline. 5 killed, 170 injured. Major economic infrastructure target.

damageLocations.name: Sharif University of Technology Electronics Research Center
damageLocations.description: US-Israeli airstrike hit Electronics Research Center at Iran's premier engineering university. Nearby gas distribution infrastructure also damaged.

damageLocations.name: Ramat Gan / Bnei Brak — Cluster Bomblet Impact Zone
damageLocations.description: 28+ cluster bomblet impact sites across densely populated Tel Aviv suburbs. Heavy damage to buildings in Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak, Givatayim. High-voltage line damaged in Rosh Ha'ayin causing power outage. 2 killed, 1 moderately wounded.

damageLocations.name: Baharestan Residential Area — Tehran
damageLocations.description: Overnight residential strike in Baharestan county. 13 killed including 4 girls and 2 boys under age 10.

damageLocations.name: Alborz Province Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Strike in Alborz province NW of Tehran. 18 killed including 2 infants, 24 injured.

damageLocations.name: Rafi-Nia Synagogue — Central Tehran
damageLocations.description: Rafi-Nia Synagogue 'completely destroyed' when adjacent residential building struck. One of the most important Khorasan Jewish gathering places.

damageLocations.name: Kharg Island Oil Terminal
damageLocations.description: New explosions reported on Kharg Island — Iran's main oil export terminal handling ~90% of oil exports. Damage to oil infrastructure not yet confirmed.

damageLocations.name: Yahyaabad Railway Bridge — Kashan
damageLocations.description: IDF strike on Yahyaabad railway bridge near Kashan. 2 killed, 3 injured.

damageLocations.name: Tabriz-Zanjan Highway Bridge
damageLocations.description: IDF strike on Tabriz-Zanjan Highway bridge in NW Iran.

damageLocations.name: Qom Province Bridge
damageLocations.description: Strike on bridge in Qom province.

damageLocations.name: Shiraz Petrochemical Complex (Nitric Acid)
damageLocations.description: Petrochemical complex — last remaining nitric acid production site.

damageLocations.name: Karaj Railway
damageLocations.description: Railway infrastructure in Karaj damaged.

damageLocations.name: Qazvin Railway
damageLocations.description: Railway infrastructure in Qazvin damaged.

damageLocations.name: SABIC Petrochemical Complex, Jubail
damageLocations.description: Debris from intercepted Iranian missiles struck SABIC petrochemical complex at Jubail Industrial City, igniting fire. Partial evacuations of worker housing ordered.

damageLocations.name: Arvan Shipbuilding Company, Khorramshahr
damageLocations.description: IDF struck Arvan Shipbuilding — produces fast-attack boats and IRGC missile corvettes. Smoke plumes visible 20km away. Shatt al-Arab shipping halted.

damageLocations.name: Shahid Mahdavi Marine Industries, Khorramshahr
damageLocations.description: IDF struck Shahid Mahdavi Marine Industries — part of 80% IRGC Navy surface combatant production capacity in Khorramshahr.

damageLocations.name: IRGC Headquarters, Natanz
damageLocations.description: IDF targeted IRGC headquarters and Iranian police headquarters in the Natanz area of Isfahan Province.

damageLocations.name: Sonar Production Facility, Shiraz
damageLocations.description: Iran's central sonar production facility destroyed by joint IAF/Navy operation. Used for submarine fleet sonar systems.

damageLocations.name: Petrochemical Plant, Shiraz
damageLocations.description: Last remaining petrochemical plant producing nitric acid for BM explosives destroyed. IDF claims 85%+ of Iran's petrochemical capacity inoperable.

damageLocations.name: BM impact sites — Petah Tikva/Ramat Gan/Bnei Brak cluster munitions
damageLocations.description: ~50 submunition impact sites from 6 Iranian BM salvos with cluster munitions. Damage across Petah Tikva, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak.

damageLocations.name: Tehran Airports (Mehrabad, Azmayesh) — IRGC aircraft destroyed
damageLocations.description: IDF struck 3 airports in Tehran destroying dozens of IRGC Air Force aircraft and helicopters. Also struck IRGC HQ, Air Force HQ, and Aviation Industries Organization building.

damageLocations.name: Kharg Island Military Targets (50+ sites)
damageLocations.description: US struck 50+ military targets on Kharg Island — bunkers, storage facilities, runways, air defense systems. Oil infrastructure not targeted per US officials.

damageLocations.name: Khorramshahr Shipyards (IRGC Navy)
damageLocations.description: Two shipbuilding companies destroyed. 80% of IRGC Navy vessels built here.

damageLocations.name: Habshan Gas Processing Facility
damageLocations.description: Fire at Habshan gas processing facility from Iranian missile debris during post-ceasefire barrage. Abu Dhabi air defenses activated.

damageLocations.name: Jubail Petrochemical Area
damageLocations.description: Jubail petrochemical area struck by Iranian ballistic missile during post-ceasefire violation attack. Extent of damage under assessment.

damageLocations.name: Lavan Island Oil Refinery
damageLocations.description: Lavan Island oil refinery attacked hours after ceasefire. Fire broke out but was contained. No casualties due to prior evacuation. Damage extent under assessment.

damageLocations.name: Kuwait Infrastructure (drone interception)
damageLocations.description: Infrastructure damage from Iranian drone attack on Kuwait. 28 drones intercepted, some debris caused ground damage.

damageLocations.name: Sitra residential area (drone debris)
damageLocations.description: Two Bahraini civilians injured in Sitra from drone interception debris. Part of Iranian retaliatory attacks targeting Bahrain.

damageLocations.name: Sirri Island crude export facilities
damageLocations.description: Explosions at Sirri Island crude export facilities ~06:30 GMT. Combined with Lavan = ~25% of Iran's crude export volume. No party claimed responsibility.

damageLocations.name: Abu Dhabi Habshan Gas Complex
damageLocations.description: Habshan gas complex operations temporarily suspended after debris fire from Iranian missile/drone interception. UAE intercepted 17 ballistic missiles and 35 drones.

damageLocations.name: Kuwait Petroleum Corporation facilities
damageLocations.description: 'Severe material damage' at KPC facilities from Iranian drone attack. 28 drones intercepted but debris caused ground damage.

damageLocations.name: Central Beirut (Operation Eternal Darkness)
damageLocations.description: Operation Eternal Darkness: 50 IAF jets struck 100+ Hezbollah targets with 160 munitions in 10 minutes. Central Beirut commercial areas struck without warning during rush hour. 254 killed, 1,165 wounded. Targets in Beirut, Beqaa Valley, southern Lebanon.

damageLocations.name: Central Beirut — Operation Eternal Darkness targets
damageLocations.description: 100+ Hezbollah targets struck across 5+ Beirut neighborhoods during rush hour. 50 IAF jets, 160 munitions in 10 minutes. 92 killed in Beirut alone, 742 wounded. Command centers, intelligence HQs, Radwan Force assets targeted.

damageLocations.name: Tallet Khayat, Beirut (Harshi assassination)
damageLocations.description: Israeli strike in Tallet Khayat neighborhood killed Ali Yusuf Harshi, personal secretary and nephew of Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem. Multistory building partially collapsed. Outside Dahiyeh stronghold.

damageLocations.name: Abbassiyeh, southern Lebanon
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Abbassiyeh killed 7 and wounded several. Part of broader strikes on Kafra, Jmaijmeh, Safad al-Battikh, Majdal Selm, Deir Antar. Artillery on Haris.

damageLocations.name: Qasmiyeh Bridge over Litani River
damageLocations.description: IDF destroyed the Qasmiyeh Bridge, the main bridge over the Litani River connecting Lebanon and southern Lebanon. Part of strategy to isolate Hezbollah in the south. Defense Minister Katz declared IDF would demolish Lebanese border villages and all Litani crossings.

damageLocations.name: Tallet Khayat residential building (Harshi assassination)
damageLocations.description: IDF airstrike on Tallet Khayat neighborhood in Beirut killed Ali Yusuf Harshi — personal secretary and nephew of Hezbollah Secretary-General Naim Qassem. Strike partially collapsed a multistory residential building. Located outside traditional Dahiyeh Hezbollah stronghold, indicating expanded targeting.

damageLocations.name: Corniche al-Mazraa Intersection, Beirut
damageLocations.description: Major intersection struck during rush hour — charred bodies in vehicles. Part of Operation Eternal Darkness.

damageLocations.name: Qasmiyeh Bridge near Tyre
damageLocations.description: Last main bridge linking southern Lebanon to rest of country damaged. Footbridge destroyed fell onto main bridge. Severing 10,000s from humanitarian aid.

damageLocations.name: Shmestar Cemetery, Beqaa Valley
damageLocations.description: Cemetery struck during funeral — 10 mourners killed, 4 wounded.

damageLocations.name: Lavan Oil Refinery, Lavan Island
damageLocations.description: Lavan Oil Refinery struck in early hours of ceasefire day. Fire ignited. No party claimed responsibility.

damageLocations.name: Qasmiyeh Bridge, near Tyre
damageLocations.description: Vital Qasmiyeh Bridge near Tyre destroyed by Israeli airstrikes. Bridge was primary humanitarian corridor to southern Lebanon. HRW reported destruction severs aid to 500K+ civilians in south.

damageLocations.name: Residential area, Aita al-Shaab
damageLocations.description: Multiple residential buildings destroyed in IDF strikes on Aita al-Shaab, southern Lebanon. At least 7 killed. Part of continued Israeli operations despite Iran ceasefire.

damageLocations.name: Nabatieh Serail (Government Building)
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike destroyed the Nabatieh Serail government building in southern Lebanon. 13 Lebanese State Security personnel killed. Lebanon's President Aoun condemned the attack on state institutions.

damageLocations.name: House hit by Hezbollah rocket, Kibbutz Misgav Am
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket directly hit a house in Kibbutz Misgav Am, northern Israel. Part of ~30 rocket barrage. No casualties reported by Magen David Adom.

damageLocations.name: School hit by Hezbollah rocket, Deir al-Asad
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket struck a school in Deir al-Asad, northern Israel. Part of ~30 rocket barrage on northern Israel. No casualties reported.

damageLocations.name: Parking lot hit by Hezbollah rocket, Safed
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket directly hit a parking lot in Safed, northern Israel. Extensive vehicle damage. MDA ambulance also damaged. Part of ~70 rocket barrage.

damageLocations.name: 1,500-year-old Byzantine church damaged, Nahariya
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket fire damaged a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya, northern Israel. Property extensively damaged.

damageLocations.name: Packaging facility fire from rockets, Metula
damageLocations.description: Fire broke out at a packaging facility in Metula after Hezbollah rocket impact. Firefighters controlled the blaze. Part of ~70 rocket barrage on northern Israel.

damageLocations.name: Residential building destroyed, Mefdoun, Lebanon
damageLocations.description: Israeli dawn airstrike destroyed a residential building in Mefdoun, Nabatiyeh district, killing 3 people.

damageLocations.name: Safed parking lot — direct rocket hit
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket directly hit a parking lot in Safed. Extensive vehicle damage. MDA ambulance also damaged. Part of 30+ rocket barrage on northern Israel.

damageLocations.name: Deir al-Asad school hit by rockets
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket hit a school in Deir al-Asad, northern Israel. Part of 30+ rocket barrage. No casualties reported.

damageLocations.name: Nahariya Byzantine church damaged by rockets
damageLocations.description: 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya damaged by Hezbollah rockets. Part of 30+ rocket barrage on northern Israel.

damageLocations.name: Shlomi apartment building damaged by rockets
damageLocations.description: Apartment building in Shlomi damaged by Hezbollah rockets/drones. Part of ongoing Hezbollah attacks on northern Israel. No injuries.

damageLocations.name: Teffahta residential buildings destroyed by Israeli airstrikes
damageLocations.description: Israeli overnight airstrikes destroyed residential buildings in Teffahta, Sidon district. 13 killed. Part of intensified strikes after Islamabad talks collapse.

damageLocations.name: Qana al-Khashna residential area destroyed
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike destroyed residential homes and infrastructure in Qana al-Khashna area. 5 killed, several wounded.

damageLocations.name: Maaroub house destroyed by Israeli airstrike
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike destroyed a house in Maaroub, killing 6 people. Overnight strike intensifying after Islamabad talks collapse.

damageLocations.name: Nabatieh government building struck — 13 security forces killed
damageLocations.description: Israeli strikes hit a government building in Nabatieh, killing 13 Lebanese state security forces. Bodies buried in Sidon on April 12. Part of intensified campaign after Islamabad talks collapse.

damageLocations.name: Bint Jbeil airstrikes and artillery damage
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrikes and artillery shelling hit Bint Jbeil. IDF 98th Division in direct urban clashes with Hezbollah at town center. Part of 200 IDF airstrikes in 24h across southern Lebanon.

damageLocations.name: Bint Jbeil Governmental Hospital raided by IDF — weapons cache seized
damageLocations.description: Givati Brigade (under 98th Division) raided Bint Jbeil Governmental Hospital. ~20 Hezbollah gunmen killed inside, ~20 more in vicinity. Weapons cache seized. Hospital extensively damaged during military operation.

damageLocations.name: Red Cross ambulance struck by Israeli drone — Beit Yahoun
damageLocations.description: Israeli drone struck Lebanese Red Cross ambulance in Beit Yahoun. Paramedic Hassan Badawi killed, another wounded. Red Cross workers were clearly marked and coordinated with UNIFIL.

damageLocations.name: Qana homes and infrastructure struck — 5 killed
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Qana killed 5 (including 3 women) and wounded 25. Strike targeted homes and infrastructure in the town.

damageLocations.name: Kiryat Shmona kindergarten hit by Hezbollah rocket
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket barrage (30+ rockets) struck Kiryat Shmona. A kindergarten was directly hit but was empty at the time. Parking lot in Safed also struck. 2 civilians lightly injured.

damageLocations.name: Bint Jbeil Governmental Hospital raided by IDF
damageLocations.description: IDF 98th Division and Givati Brigade raided hospital in Bint Jbeil used by Hezbollah as fighting position. ~40 Hezbollah killed. Weapons cache seized. Hospital damaged in operation. Stadium nearby also captured.

damageLocations.name: Nahariya residential building hit by Hezbollah rocket
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket struck residential building in Nahariya after 6 of 7 rockets intercepted by Iron Dome. ~60-year-old woman lightly wounded with missile and glass fragments.

damageLocations.name: ICRC center area in Tyre damaged by Israeli strike
damageLocations.description: Israeli strike near ICRC center in Tyre killed 1 person being transported for medical treatment. Red Cross vehicles damaged. ICRC head Agnes Dhur condemned strikes as 'gravely concerning.'

damageLocations.name: Maaroub village residential home destroyed by Israeli strike
damageLocations.description: Israeli strike on residential home in Maaroub village near Tyre killed 6 people (corrected from initial 4). Home housed 7 people, no prior warning given. Rescue operations continued April 13.

damageLocations.name: Bint Jbeil — multiple Hezbollah infrastructure sites destroyed in IDF encirclement
damageLocations.description: IDF 98th Division completed encirclement of Bint Jbeil, destroying dozens of Hezbollah infrastructure sites and seizing hundreds of weapons. 100+ Hezbollah killed in CQC and airstrikes. Historic stronghold — site of heaviest fighting in 2006 war. Government Hospital and eastern districts cleared.

damageLocations.name: Jbaa family home destroyed — 4 killed (man, wife, son, daughter-in-law)
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on family home in Jbaa killed 4 family members. One of multiple strikes across southern Lebanon on April 15, one day after historic Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington.

damageLocations.name: Ansariyeh strike — 5 killed in Israeli airstrike
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Ansariyeh killed 5 people. IDF claims 200+ Hezbollah targets struck in past 24 hours.

damageLocations.name: Qadmus strike — 4 killed in Israeli airstrike
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Qadmus killed 4 people. Part of widespread April 15 strikes across southern Lebanon.

damageLocations.name: Mayfadoun triple-tap — 3 paramedics killed, 6 injured
damageLocations.description: Triple-tap Israeli airstrike on Mayfadoun killed 3 Lebanese Civil Defence paramedics and injured 6. One paramedic missing. Strike targeted first responders arriving to help wounded.

damageLocations.name: Jbaa family home — 4 killed including couple and children
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Jbaa killed 4 family members (couple, son, daughter-in-law). Part of 20+ killed in April 15 evening strikes.

damageLocations.name: Bint Jbeil — extensive urban destruction from IDF 98th Division battle
damageLocations.description: Extensive urban destruction in Bint Jbeil as IDF 98th Division nears full capture. Town shelled by artillery and airstrikes since April 9. 100+ Hezbollah killed. 3 Radwan fighters captured. 1 IDF soldier killed, 13 wounded.

damageLocations.name: IDF 146th Division logistics base near Nahariya — Hezbollah drone strike damage
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah drone strikes hit IDF 146th Division logistics base near Nahariya and nearby settlement near Liman barracks. Part of 39 Hezbollah operations in 24 hours.

damageLocations.name: Qasmiyeh Bridge — last remaining bridge over Litani River completely destroyed
damageLocations.description: Israeli warplanes carried out two consecutive airstrikes completely destroying Qasmiyeh Bridge — the last remaining bridge crossing over the Litani River. Southern Lebanon (~10% of country) fully severed from the rest of the country. Lebanese army evacuated checkpoint and closed roads.

damageLocations.name: Nabatieh residential area — Israeli airstrike minutes after ceasefire announcement
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike killed 8 and injured dozens in Nabatieh residential area, minutes after Trump announced the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. One of the last strikes before the ceasefire took effect at midnight Beirut time.

damageLocations.name: Kunin Civil Defense ambulance — Israeli drone strike during ceasefire
damageLocations.description: Israeli drone strike on Lebanese Civil Defense ambulance in Kunin during 10-day ceasefire. 3 medics wounded, one critically. Second ceasefire violation within hours.
